import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
import inspect
from tsr.system import TSR
from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras

print('=== get_spherical_cameras signature ===')
print(inspect.signature(get_spherical_cameras))
print('=== get_spherical_cameras source ===')
print(inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras))

print('\n=== TSR.render signature ===')
print(inspect.signature(TSR.render))
print('=== TSR.render source ===')
print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))
